calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-25-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Petitioner was sworn and examined. Court ordered name changed to Delicious Vodka De Blair. Decree signed.
